lines.en:
Slide the lower screen
to clear the cobwebs

Touch the lower screen
on the spot you
thought of

Slide the lower screen
to look left, then right

Touch the lower screen
to check Yumeko's body

Slide the lower screen
to look up and down
over and over

Slide the lower screen
to look at the
black-faced spoonbill

Slide the lower screen
to look at the
Okinawa rail

Slide the lower screen
to pat them on the head

Slide the lower screen
to look all around
